# Stauridis Photography & Film

> Photography and film from Athens — portraits, couples, weddings, events and video. Honest, warm, unposed moments captured worldwide by Panagiotis Stauridis.

## Services
- Portrait Photography
- Couples Photography
- Wedding & Baptism Photography
- Events & Nightlife Photography
- Street Photography
- Video Production & Reels

## Contact
- Email: info.stauridis@gmail.com
- Instagram: @panagiotisstauridis
- Location: Athens, Greece — Worldwide
